results.title: Belarus considers drone strike on bus in Russia’s Bryansk Oblast act of terrorism
results.description: Belarus considers the drone strike on a civilian bus in Bryansk Oblast of Russia an act of terrorism against the peaceful population, Permanent Representative of Belarus to the OSCE Andrei Dapkiunas made the statement during his speech at the OSCE Annual Security Review Conference.

results.title: The Latest: US and Iran sign initial deal to end war, ease sanctions and open strait
results.description: President Donald Trump has signed an agreement with Iran that calls for Tehran to dilute its stockpile of highly enriched uranium and waives U.S.-backed sanctions on the country, immediately allowing Iran to sell its oil freely in a major concession from Washington, according to details released by both countries. results.title: Jordanian humanitarian aid convoy arrives in Lebanon
results.description: The eighth convoy of humanitarian aid organized by Jordan arrived at the Lebanese border crossing of Masnaa on Thursday. The convoy consisted of 19 trucks delivered to Lebanon through the Higher Relief Committee.The convoy was received by Jordan's Ambassador to Lebanon, Walid Abdulrahman Al-Hadid,...
